subcodes.first_line: O thou favored servant at the Divine Threshold! That which was written unto Mírzá Núr'd-Dín—upon him be the Glory of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مقبول درگاه کبریاء آنچه بجناب میرزا نورالدین علیه بهاء الله مرقوم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @suffering and imprisonment
